title: Support-Ticket Sentiment × Repeat-Purchase Cohort → Pre-Churn Detection (Retail)
summary: No public data required. Recipe is reproducible on internal helpdesk + purchase data. Published research broadly supports support-sentiment as a churn-prediction feature; verdict held at PLAUSIBLE pending client-data validation.

evidence.reason: no public-data validation possible by claim definition
research_references: Reichheld & Schefter 2000 — E-loyalty: your secret weapon on the web; HBR.
Lemmens & Croux 2006 — Bagging and boosting classification trees to predict churn; Journal of Marketing Research.
Chen & Chiu 2009 — A real-time online customer service decision-support system using SVM; Expert Systems with Applications.

notes: Triple-conjunction predictor is operational guidance; not a magic-number claim.
PLAUSIBLE is the highest verdict band achievable for purely-internal recipes.
